_comment: Coverage ratchet baseline — total LINE coverage % per suite, MEASURED from a real CI-equivalent run. The coverage-ratchet script compares each run against these (NOISE_TOLERANCE_PP slack). vitest: informational signal (the vitest.config thresholds are the hard gate). rust: HARD-GATED (the rust ratchet call passes --gate; a drop beyond tolerance fails the cargo-coverage job, which is in validate-all's needs) and measured WORKSPACE-wide since #2817. Re-baseline on main with `--update` after a deliberate change. rust last re-baselined 91.61→90.6 for #2621 Sync-C-prep: lifting the inline `#[cfg(test)]` sync test modules into sibling `*_tests.rs` files reproducibly shifted the llvm-cov measurement down ~1pp with ZERO production-code change — the same class of extraction-shifted measurement re-baselined for the loro extraction in c13e6d2.
